waivers.rationale: Semgrep 1.170.0 requires click~=8.1.8, while the advisory is fixed only in Click 8.3.3. The allowed non-interactive scan path does not invoke click.edit.
mitigations: The waived dependency exists only in the ephemeral security-tool environment.
CI invokes one fixed Semgrep scan command with a repository-local ruleset.
The waiver expires automatically and blocks repository audit if not renewed or removed.
